race.description: Yabby Dam Farms Nsw Trotters Oaks (G1)
race.comment: JILLIBY AURA (5) looks to have come back in fine order having raced parked from this barrier in beating the boys for a fresh win at Bendigo. She was one of the better Victorian fillies of last season, winning the Nutrien Classic and placing in both the Vicbred and Breeders Crown finals. Should be improved second-up and draws better than some of her main rivals. ELLE PERFECTO (10) cops another wide draw but has come from similar barriers in winning twice at this circuit already this campaign. She is race fit and capable. GLADIATRIX (11) came from this barrier when runner-up to ELLE PERFECTO last start and was runner-up against the boys in the Gold Coronet earlier in her campaign. Player with her A-game. ADELAIDE RED (4) was an upset Breeders Crown winner over a few of these rivals at the end of last campaign and a fresh win suggests she is back in good order. She has the speed to be prominent from a low draw. ALDEBARAN ADA (1) gets the inside barrier and can be competitive from there.
